title: CCL - Restore defaults
scenario: CCL (Call Clarity Level) does not revert to default "UC Noise Block" after restoring device to default settings via Device Settings > Reset Device > Restore
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Bluetooth audio device that supports Call Clarity Level (CCL) is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Change the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting to 'No Noise Block' or 'AI Noise Block'.
7. Tap on 'Reset Device' > 'Restore' to restore the device to default settings.
8. Navigate back to Device Settings > Advanced.
9. Observe the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting.
expected: The Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting reverts to the default "UC Noise Block".
